_readme: Video Manifest for 3rd Grade Science. Paste your SharePoint/OneDrive embed URL into the 'embed' field for each slot. Set status to 'ready' when done. The lesson pages will auto-load videos from this file.
_manifest_url: UPDATE THIS: raw GitHub URL to this file, e.g. https://raw.githubusercontent.com/YOUR-ORG/YOUR-REPO/main/video-manifest.json
